body:
Title: CRA Schedule 15 2025 FHSA Contributions, Transfers and Activities.

Source:
- https://www.canada.ca/content/dam/cra-arc/formspubs/pbg/5000-s15/5000-s15-25e.pdf

CRA Schedule 15 2025:
Step 2 calculates the annual FHSA limit for 2025. Line 3 is line 1 minus line 2. Line 5 is line 3 plus line 4. Line 9 is line 7 minus line 8. Line 11 is line 9 plus line 10. Line 12 is line 6 minus line 11, floored at zero. Line 13 is line 5 minus line 12, floored at zero. Line 14 is 8000. Line 16 is line 14 plus carryforward for 2025. Line 19 is line 17 plus line 18. Line 22 is line 20 plus line 21. Line 23 is line 19 minus line 22, the net RRSP-to-FHSA transfer amount. Line 27 is line 25 minus line 26. Line 29 is line 27 minus line 28, floored at zero. Line 30 is 8000. Line 32 is line 30 plus line 31. Line 33 is the lesser of line 29 and line 32. Line 35 is line 33 plus line 34. Line 36 is line 24 minus line 35. Line 39 is line 37 minus line 38, floored at zero. Line 40 is the lesser of line 13 and line 39, unless the maximum participation period ended in a prior year, in which case the annual FHSA limit is 0.
Step 3 calculates the FHSA deduction and unused contributions. Line 43 is line 41 plus line 42. Line 45 is line 43 minus line 44. Line 46 lifetime FHSA limit is 40000. Line 48 is line 46 minus line 47. Line 50 is line 48 minus line 49, floored at zero. Line 51 is the lesser of line 45 and line 50. Line 54 is line 52 plus line 53. Line 56 is line 54 minus line 55. Line 57 is the FHSA deduction for 2025, not more than line 51, entered on line 20805. Line 58 is line 56 minus line 57.
Step 4 line 59 reports total qualifying withdrawals made in 2025.
